title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Business Hurt by China VBP, Price Woe
text: According to Zimmer Biomet (ZBH), severe customer staffing shortages and a more-than-anticipated impact of China VBP lead to dismal Q4 revenues.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Opens New ZBEdge Centre in Singapore
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) CEC will function as the interface between healthcare professionals and the company through engaging and interactive training across all product portfolios.

title: Zimmer Biomet: Exploiting Low Implied Volatility To Play The Upcoming Spin-Off
text: Zimmer Biomet is about to spin off its dental and spine business, and the transaction is expected to unlock value for shareholders.

title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc. (ZBH) CEO Bryan Hanson on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc. (ZBH) CEO Bryan Hanson on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Margins Down
text: According to Zimmer Biomet (ZBH), both Q4 net sales and earnings metrics are negatively impacted by China VBP in Knees, Hips and S.E.T. product categories.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Lags Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Zimmer (ZBH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -0.51% and 0.64%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Omicron Weighs On Zimmer Biomet As Q4 Earnings Lag Consensus, Issues FY22 Guidance
text: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc's  ZBH Q4 sales decreased by 2.3% Y/Y to $2.04 billion (down 0.8% on a constant currency basis), missing the Street estimate of $2.07 billion. Get the Inside Access Traders Are Using to Profit More and Win Bigger.
